global_description: A small, slender songbird with a streamlined body. It features a bright yellow throat and chest, contrasted by a slate gray back and wings. The bird has a distinctive black necklace pattern across its chest and a white eye-ring.

part_details.throat_chest: Vivid yellow, smooth texture, prominent in contrast to the rest of the body.
part_details.back_wings: Slate gray, sleek feathers, providing a muted contrast to the bright chest.
part_details.necklace: Distinctive black band across the chest, resembling a necklace.
part_details.eye_ring: White, circular marking around the eye, enhancing facial features.

spatial_relations: The bright yellow chest is positioned below the slate gray head.
The black necklace pattern crosses the upper chest.
The white eye-ring encircles the eye, contrasting with the dark head.
